info.title: seqob/v1/offer.proto
info.description:
SeqOB — the Sequentia peer-to-peer order-book DEX wire schema.

A resting offer is a SIGNED price/size/expiry intent, never a PSET and never
named UTXOs (online orders). The settlement transaction (same-chain) or HTLC
legs (cross-chain / Lightning) are built only at lift time, so the joint
confidential blinding can use both parties' data. The non-custodial relay
stores and serves these signed offers; it never holds funds.
